observations.archetype_gloss: Embodiment of decay and hoarding, representing the dark, repressed aspects of self
observations.summary: Aviel, though physically diminished by years of hoarding and withdrawal, exerts a powerful presence that fills the room, symbolizing the overwhelming weight of his internal decay and shadow aspects inflating within him.

evidence.quote: Aviel stood. He was not a tall man—years of hunching over his hoard had compressed him, made him smaller—but in that moment, he seemed to fill the room.
